arts.ttl: 'I didn't think he'd be that good' - Thierry Henry gives honest assessment of Bukayo Saka
arts.sum: Thierry Henry has admitted he is shocked by just how good Bukayo Saka has become after the Arsenal star scored in their Champions League victory over Paris Saint-Germain. Last year's Champions League semi-finalists proved no match for Arsenal, with England international Saka impressing in particular.

arts.ttl: Russell Martin Gives Honest Reaction to Jack Stephens FA Charge at Southampton
arts.sum: Southampton captain Jack Stephens has been handed a further two-game suspension after his red card against Man Utd, leaving his team short on numbers.

arts.ttl: 'I don't mind admitting': Pundit admits he was wrong about Arsenal's 'brilliant' £27m signing
arts.sum: The Arsenal star continues to prove the critics wrong...

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry: Arsenal were too quick to replace Unai Emery with Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Villa have continued their progress this season, sitting a point behind Arsenal and beating Bayern Munich in the Champions League this week, leading to Henry rueing his former side’s hasty decision to sack Emery. Emery was given the unenviable task of replacing Arsene Wenger at Arsenal in 2018 but the Spaniard lasted just 18 months at the helm before being sacked in November 2019 and replaced by Mikel Arteta.

arts.ttl: Fulham abandoned £15m deal to sign player from Southampton, now he's in UEFA Champions League Team of the Week
UEL and UECL Liveblog: Lazio-Nice, Elfsborg-Roma, Fiorentina-New Saints
'The hunger': Martin hints at shock re-call for Southampton player not seen in 14 months
arts.sum: He hasn't played for The Saints since August 2023...

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Southampton: Prediction, kick-off time, TV, live stream, team news, h2h results, odds
arts.sum: The Gunners are battling to keep pace with Liverpool and Man City in Premier League title race

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Man United-linked Benjamin Sesko addresses Leipzig future amid 'interest from 20 clubs'
arts.sum: As many as 20 clubs including Arsenal and Manchester United seemingly suffer a blow in their pursuit of RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko.

arts.ttl: Henry Claims Unai Emery Would Have Succeeded at Arsenal With More Time
arts.sum: After leading Aston Villa to an incredible win over Bayern Munich, Thierry Henry believes Unai Emery could've been a success as Arsenal manager.
